title: Top Gear
desc: Arjun, a taxi driver, faces danger when a drug dealer kidnaps his wife, forcing him into a risky mission to rescue her and survive.

title: Tu Jhoothi Main Makkar
desc: Mickey, a carefree businessman who breaks up couples for a living, falls for spirited Tinni, forcing him to rethink love, commitment, and his own chaotic lifestyle.

title: Player Ek Khiladi
desc: In Mumbai, Ashok seeks revenge. He forces Arjun and their lovers to help. They target the Home Minister and his allies. Will they succeed in their dangerous plan?

title: Laabam
desc: Returning from exile, Pakkiri challenges the oppressive village chief, Vanagamudi. With newfound local support, Pakkiri spearheads a transformation in farming techniques and village governance.

title: Major
desc: Major Sandeep Unnikrishnan heroically fights during a terrorist attack at the Taj Hotel, joining the task force and putting his life on the line for many innocents.

title: Toxic Shark
desc: A group of friends on a short trip face terror as acid-spitting, poisonous sharks emerge. Their vacation turns into a desperate fight for survival.
